message:
test(messaging): comprehensive federation test suite for morphism constraints, bridge lifecycle, and replication

Add ~580 lines of federation tests covering the full validation and
lifecycle surface area (bead 8w83i.11.3):

MorphismConstraints validation (8 tests):
- Default allows DerivedView+Egress, rejects empty classes/zero
  expansion/zero fanout
- admits() checks expansion factor, fanout, and class membership
- Boundary: max_expansion_factor=1 admits exact match

FederationBridge lifecycle (12 tests):
- State machine: Proposed→Activating→Active→Closing→Closed
- activate_bridge() on Active is idempotent
- close_bridge() from every state is well-defined
- Cannot activate or re-activate a Closed bridge
- create_bridge with duplicate pattern returns DuplicateSubjectPattern
- Multiple bridges share a single link, second close removes the link

ReplicationConfig and policy (4 tests):
- Default OrderingGuarantee is PartialOrder, CatchUpPolicy is FromLatest
- Total ordering with FromStart catch-up produces deterministic snapshots
- Round-trip serde fidelity for complex configs

CatchUpPolicy edge cases (3 tests):
- AtSequence(0), AtSequence(u64::MAX), and FromLatest positioning

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
